nav.new_project_hint_body: Ask the agent to create a project when you are ready to start a new workspace.
nav.user_placeholder: User profile placeholder — binds to GitHub OAuth in V1 self-host.
profile.local_signout_hint: Local mode has no browser session to sign out.
help.title: Surface help
help.surface.today.title: today
help.surface.today.description: Project change briefing, scoped by the current area when one is selected.
help.surface.reader.title: wiki
help.surface.reader.description: Artifact reading surface with area, type, and trust filters.
help.surface.inbox.title: inbox
help.surface.inbox.description: Review queue surface for sensitive operations and publish attention.
help.surface.graph.title: graph
help.surface.graph.description: Relationship map for artifacts, edges, areas, and types.
help.surface.tasks.title: task
help.surface.tasks.description: Task lifecycle board with an inspector for operational metadata.
help.type.Analysis.description: Evidence, tradeoffs, or investigation without a final decision.
help.type.Task.description: Work item with owner, status, and acceptance checks.
help.type.Debug.description: Failure report, reproduction, hypothesis, and fix notes.
help.type.Glossary.description: Term definition and boundary for shared language.
help.type.Flow.description: User, system, or agent sequence across steps.
help.type.Feature.description: Product capability or behavior users can experience.
help.type.APIEndpoint.description: HTTP/API contract, request shape, and response shape.
help.type.Screen.description: User-facing UI surface and state model.
help.type.DataModel.description: Entity, field, relation, and storage structure.
help.area.strategy.description: Direction, goals, scope, roadmap, and product bets.
help.area.context.description: External facts, research, competitors, and standards.
help.area.experience.description: User or developer-visible screens, flows, and content.
help.area.system.description: Internal architecture, data, APIs, runtime, and mechanisms.
help.area.operations.description: Delivery, release, deployment, incident, and support work.
help.area.governance.description: Policy, permission, ownership, review, and taxonomy rules.
help.area.cross-cutting.description: Reusable concerns that apply across multiple areas.
help.area.misc.description: Temporary overflow when the primary shelf is unclear.
help.status.open.description: Work that still needs action. Treat it as the primary execution signal in the Task surface.
help.status.blocked.description: Work is stopped until a dependency or policy question is resolved.
help.status.done.description: Implementation is settled. It should be lower priority in default execution views.
help.status.priority.description: P0-P3 priority. Lower numbers should be handled first.
sidebar.templates_hint: Toggle inclusion of _template_ artifacts (per-type recommended structure) in the list
sidebar.type_locked_hint: task pins Type to Task. Switch to wiki for cross-type filtering.
surface.not_found: "%s" is not available in this instance. Continue from Today.
surface.unavailable_sidecar: This surface is not available in this instance.
artifact.visibility.org_desc: Readable by project or organization members.
artifact.visibility.private_desc: Managed by owners for sensitive artifacts.
tasks.blocked_hint: This Task is blocked by another artifact. Open it to see the blocking edge.
tasks.empty_filtered_head: No matching tasks in this filter.
tasks.inspector_empty: Select a card background to preview it here; use the title to open full detail.
tasks.flow_no_current_user: Current user is not available for the Mine filter.
tasks.flow_actor_required: Choose an actor value for this filter.
task_controls.err_no_revision: Current revision number missing — reload the page and retry.
task_inspector.heading: Task operations
tasks.card_select_hint: Select the card background for Inspector preview; use the title for full detail
reader.backlinks_empty: No artifacts reference %s yet. Graph edges populate as you write — any propose that mentions an existing slug creates a backlink.
reader.card_select_hint: Select the card background for Inspector preview; use the title for full detail.
reader.inspector_empty: Select a card background to preview it here; use the title to open full detail.
sidecar.copy_unsupported: Clipboard not supported in this browser
reader.structure_sidecar_hint: Structured data is in the Inspector
git.commit_unavailable: This commit is not available from the configured git provider.
git.no_references: No artifacts reference this commit yet.
git.unavailable.no_provider_for_repo: No local git provider is configured for this repo.
git.unavailable.commit_too_short: Commit SHA must be at least 7 characters.
git.unavailable.path_not_found: Path was not found at this commit.
git.unavailable.size_cap_exceeded: File is too large to preview inline.
git.unavailable.missing_repo_or_commit: Pin is missing repo or commit coordinates.
reader.scope_sibling_nav: Previous and next artifacts in this area
reader.badge_area_tip: Meaning: the Area this artifact belongs to. Appears on: area_slug=%s. Change path: reclassify the artifact to match the Area taxonomy.
trust.unclassified.label: Unclassified
trust.unclassified.tip: Meaning: no epistemic metadata is attached. Appears on: legacy artifacts or revisions that did not set meta. Change path: fill artifact_meta on the next propose.
trust.verification.verified.label: Verified
trust.verification.verified.tip: Meaning: checked against code or authoritative evidence. Appears on: verification_state=verified. Change path: update artifact_meta.verification_state through propose with evidence.
trust.verification.partially_verified.ti: Meaning: some evidence exists, but the artifact is not fully verified. Appears on: verification_state=partially_verified or fallback. Change path: add evidence pins and update verification_state.
trust.verification.unverified.label: Unverified
trust.verification.unverified.tip: Meaning: no verification evidence is attached. Appears on: verification_state=unverified. Change path: add code pins, TCs, or other evidence.
trust.read_state.deeply_read.label: Deeply read by human
trust.read_state.deeply_read.tip: Meaning: a human has read this artifact thoroughly (completion %d%%). Appears on: read_events aggregate where active_seconds × scroll_max ≥ 0.8. Change path: auto-updates on each read. Signals an AI change is ready for explicit verify.
trust.read_state.read.label: Read by human
trust.read_state.read.tip: Meaning: a human has read this meaningfully (completion %d%%). Appears on: completion 0.5–0.8. Change path: auto-updates after deep read.
trust.read_state.glanced.label: Glanced
trust.read_state.glanced.tip: Meaning: a human has skimmed but not read this through (completion %d%%). Appears on: dwell or scroll partial. Change path: auto-updates after reading through.
trust.source.code.label: Code
trust.source.code.tip: Meaning: repository code pins are the main evidence. Appears on: source_type=code. Change path: update pins and source_type through propose.
trust.source.artifact.label: Artifact-derived
trust.source.artifact.tip: Meaning: derived from other artifacts. Appears on: source_type=artifact. Change path: maintain relates_to together with source_type.
trust.source.user_chat.label: Conversation-derived
trust.source.user_chat.tip: Meaning: derived from a user conversation turn. Appears on: source_type=user_chat. Change path: set consent_state and canonicalization evidence.
trust.source.external.label: External
trust.source.external.tip: Meaning: derived from external docs, specs, or URLs. Appears on: source_type=external. Change path: add a URL pin or source note.
trust.source.mixed.label: Mixed
trust.source.mixed.tip: Meaning: evidence combines code, artifacts, chat, or external sources. Appears on: source_type=mixed. Change path: split evidence into pins and relates_to entries.
trust.source.unclassified.tip: Meaning: source_type is not classified. Appears on: missing meta or legacy rows. Change path: choose source_type on the next propose.
trust.next_context.default.label: Context: default
trust.next_context.default.tip: Meaning: eligible for default next-session landing. Appears on: next_context_policy=default. Change path: set opt_in or excluded if it should stay out.
trust.next_context.default_missing.tip: Meaning: no explicit policy, so the server treats it as default-eligible. Appears on: missing next_context_policy. Change path: set the policy on the next propose.
trust.next_context.opt_in.label: Context: opt-in
trust.next_context.opt_in.tip: Meaning: surfaces only when directly searched or retrieved. Appears on: next_context_policy=opt_in. Change path: switch to default if it belongs in landing context.
trust.next_context.excluded.label: Excluded from context
trust.next_context.excluded.tip: Meaning: skipped from default next-session context. Appears on: next_context_policy=excluded. Change path: switch to opt_in or default if needed again.
trust.warning.near_duplicate.label: Near-duplicate candidate
trust.warning.near_duplicate.tip: Meaning: semantic search found a close artifact. Appears on: RECOMMEND_READ_BEFORE_CREATE warning. Change path: update the existing artifact with update_of instead of creating another.
trust.warning.canonical_rewrite.label: Uncertain rewrite
trust.warning.canonical_rewrite.tip: Meaning: a canonical section changed without new evidence. Appears on: CANONICAL_REWRITE_WITHOUT_EVIDENCE warning. Change path: add pins, a verification bump, or an evidence commit message.
trust.warning.consent_required.label: Consent pending
trust.warning.consent_required.tip: Meaning: user-chat-derived content lacks a consent state. Appears on: CONSENT_REQUIRED_FOR_USER_CHAT warning. Change path: set consent_state to granted, denied, or another explicit value.
trust.warning.source_unclassified.label: Unclassified source
trust.warning.source_unclassified.tip: Meaning: the source axis is not classified. Appears on: SOURCE_TYPE_UNCLASSIFIED warning. Change path: add source_type and evidence pins.
trust.confidence.low.label: Confidence: low
trust.confidence.low.tip: Meaning: the authoring agent reported low confidence. Appears on: confidence=low. Change path: add evidence and update confidence.
trust.audience.owner_only.label: Owner only
trust.audience.owner_only.tip: Meaning: only the owner should see this. Appears on: audience=owner_only. Change path: update audience when the sharing scope changes.
trust.audience.approvers.label: Approvers only
trust.audience.approvers.tip: Meaning: limited to approvers. Appears on: audience=approvers. Change path: update audience when the sharing scope changes.
trust.task.claimed_done.label: Completed
trust.task.claimed_done.tip: Meaning: implementation is complete and the Task is settled. Create follow-up work if more changes are needed.
trust.task.blocked.label: Blocked
trust.task.blocked.tip: Meaning: an external dependency blocks progress. Appears on: task_meta.status=blocked. Change path: resolve the blocker and update status.
trust.task.cancelled.label: Cancelled
trust.task.cancelled.tip: Meaning: the task was abandoned. Appears on: task_meta.status=cancelled. Change path: create a new Task if it becomes relevant again.

history.title: History
diff.title: diff · rev %s → rev %s
home.title: Pindoc · M1 visual skeleton
home.callout: Everything shown here is a Claude Design mockup. Not a React component yet. The outer left rail is a dev scaffold for browsing the handoff — it is not part of the product. React-ification starts in M1.5 (Wiki Reader first).
wiki.empty_detail: Pick an artifact from the list.
wiki.empty_tasks_detail: Pick a task from the list.
wiki.stub_graph: Graph relationships will appear here as artifacts are connected.
wiki.stub_inbox: No reviews pending. Sensitive operations will appear here when they need approval; check Today or Tasks for current work.
inbox.disabled_empty: Review queue is off. Enable it in project settings to hold sensitive operations here.
settings.title: Project settings
settings.review_queue_desc: Sensitive operations wait in the review queue before publish. When off, they publish automatically and inbox is hidden from top navigation.
settings.visibility_public_desc: Readable by anyone, including signed-out visitors.
settings.visibility_org_desc: Readable by members of this organization.
settings.owner_only: Only project owners can change this setting.
graph.empty: No artifacts to graph yet. Create artifacts in Wiki or import an existing project to populate the relationship map.
graph.empty_filtered: No artifacts in this graph scope. Clear the Area/Type filters or choose a broader Wiki scope.
graph.no_edges: No edges inside this scope yet. Nodes are still shown; open a related artifact to add relationship edges.
members_panel.label: Project member management
members_panel.last_owner_blocked: You cannot leave as the last owner. Grant owner access to another member first.
members_panel.leave_confirm: Leave this project? You will need an owner invite link to rejoin.
members_panel.error_last_owner: The last owner cannot leave. Grant owner access to another member first.
members_panel.error_project_owner_requir: Only project owners can remove other members.
members_panel.error_member_not_found: That member was not found. Refresh the list and try again.
today.title: Today
today.brief_bullet_open_history: Open Wiki or Tasks for the full history
today.empty: No new Change Groups. Open Wiki or Tasks for the full history.
today.empty_filtered: No Change Groups match this filter. Clear the filter or review all changes.
today.empty_all: No new Change Groups project-wide. Open Wiki or Tasks for the full history.
today.empty_area: No new Change Groups in %s. Clear the Area filter to see project-wide changes.
today.empty_filtered_all: No Change Groups match this filter project-wide. Return the filter to All.
today.empty_filtered_area: No Change Groups match this filter in %s. Clear the filter or choose another Area.
today.card_select_hint: Show first artifact in Inspector. Shift+Enter or O opens full detail.
today.inspector_empty: Click a change card to populate the Inspector.
today.fallback_recent_7d: No new changes — showing the last 7 days.
today.fallback_importance_top: Nothing in the last 7 days either — showing the highest-importance groups.
new_project.welcome.title: Welcome to Pindoc
new_project.welcome.subtitle: Create your first project to get started. Next steps: paste the `.mcp.json` snippet → open Claude Code in your workspace.
new_project.title: Create a new project
new_project.subtitle: One Pindoc instance hosts many projects. Use a separate project per workspace so writes stay scoped.
new_project.field.slug.hint: Becomes part of the URL (`/p/{slug}/...`). Lowercase letters + digits + hyphens, 2-40 chars, must start with a letter.
new_project.field.name: Name
new_project.field.language.hint: Cannot be changed after create — drives the artifact-writing language and the locale of seeded area descriptions. Pick deliberately.
new_project.success.title: Project "%s" created
new_project.success.subtitle: %s areas + %s template artifacts seeded.
new_project.snippet.intro: Drop a `.mcp.json` in your workspace root with this content:
new_project.harness_hint: Then open Claude Code in that workspace and call `pindoc.harness.install` to set up PINDOC.md.
new_project.error.SLUG_INVALID: Slug shape is invalid. Use lowercase letters + digits + hyphens, 2-40 chars, starting with a letter.
new_project.error.SLUG_RESERVED: This slug is reserved (collides with routes like `/admin`, `/api`, `/wiki`). Pick something specific to this project.
new_project.error.SLUG_TAKEN: A project with this slug already exists. Pick a different slug.
new_project.error.LANG_REQUIRED: Pick a primary language. It cannot be changed after create.
new_project.error.LANG_INVALID: Supported languages are en / ko / ja. Primary language is immutable after create.
new_project.error.GIT_REMOTE_URL_INVALID: Git remote URL must be a recognizable GitHub-style host/owner/repo remote.
new_project.error.BAD_JSON: Request format invalid. Refresh and try again.
invite.modal.title: Invite teammate
signup.title: Join workspace
signup.loading.title: Checking invite
signup.missing.title: Invite required
signup.missing.body: Open the signup link from your workspace invite.
signup.invalid.title: Invite unavailable
signup.invalid.inactive: This invite is expired or already used. Ask the project owner for a new link.
signup.invalid.not_found: This invite link does not match an active invite.
signup.invalid.unknown: This invite cannot be used right now.
signup_complete.title: Workspace joined
signup_complete.snippet.intro: Drop a `.mcp.json` in your workspace root with this content:
signup_complete.harness_hint: Then open Claude Code in that workspace and call `pindoc.harness.install` with the project slug when needed.
ops.title: MCP telemetry
ops.empty: No tool calls in the last %s. Either no MCP sessions ran in this window or the telemetry pipeline is not wired.
ops.footer: Token counts are approximations. Actual billing may differ.
